## Problem

Describe the problem this change addresses.

## Change

Describe the smallest relevant behavioral change.

## Validation

- [ ] `make validate` passes locally.
- [ ] New or changed scripts have deterministic test coverage.
- [ ] No PDF, EPUB, private data, or copyrighted passage was added.

## Method and cognitive-load impact

Name the affected book chapter or primary source, if applicable. Explain what
the change adds, removes, sequences, or defers for the user.
